name: Acolyte
loreHtml: Acolytes are beginning spellcasters that draw their power from the gods. Due to the popularity and strength of Kari, the human goddess, the vast majority of acolyte’s in the world are human. However, acolytes of other races do still exist. Some may follow Kari, while others may follow their own god or goddess.
loreText: Acolytes are beginning spellcasters that draw their power from the gods. Due to the popularity and strength of Kari, the human goddess, the vast majority of acolyte’s in the world are human. However, acolytes of other races do still exist. Some may follow Kari, while others may follow their own god or goddess.

name: Alchemic Golem
loreHtml:
Alchemic Golems are formidable constructs meticulously crafted by skilled Artificers and Alchemists. These hulking guardians come in various configurations, each tailored to serve specific security purposes within their designated domains. Typically stationed as protectors, Alchemic Golems stand sentinel over valuable treasures, ancient secrets, and critical research facilities, ensuring that only those deemed worthy may pass.

Despite their imposing size and intricate designs, each Golem exhibits a unique blend of alchemical prowess and mechanical ingenuity, reflecting the expertise of their creators. Adventurers delving into forgotten ruins or exploring cutting-edge research facilities can expect to encounter diverse variants of these sentinels. Whether guarding the remnants of a lost civilization or the forefront of arcane experimentation, Alchemic Golems present both a significant challenge and a testament to the enduring legacy of their makers.
loreText:
Alchemic Golems are formidable constructs meticulously crafted by skilled Artificers and Alchemists. These hulking guardians come in various configurations, each tailored to serve specific security purposes within their designated domains. Typically stationed as protectors, Alchemic Golems stand sentinel over valuable treasures, ancient secrets, and critical research facilities, ensuring that only those deemed worthy may pass.

Despite their imposing size and intricate designs, each Golem exhibits a unique blend of alchemical prowess and mechanical ingenuity, reflecting the expertise of their creators. Adventurers delving into forgotten ruins or exploring cutting-edge research facilities can expect to encounter diverse variants of these sentinels. Whether guarding the remnants of a lost civilization or the forefront of arcane experimentation, Alchemic Golems present both a significant challenge and a testament to the enduring legacy of their makers.

name: Alpha Wolf
loreHtml: A big wolf in charge of a pack.
loreText: A big wolf in charge of a pack.

name: Amanita Mushroom
loreHtml: An almost mindless creature, the Amanita will attack nearby people if it needs to feed. Otherwise, it is docile unless provoked.
loreText: An almost mindless creature, the Amanita will attack nearby people if it needs to feed. Otherwise, it is docile unless provoked.

name: Animal Summoner
loreHtml: The process of animal summoning is usually done by Fae, but any mage can learn it if they are in tune with nature.
loreText: The process of animal summoning is usually done by Fae, but any mage can learn it if they are in tune with nature.

name: Apprentice
loreHtml: Apprentices are beginning spellcasters without a specialization. They exist in every race, though human mages are the rarest ones.
loreText: Apprentices are beginning spellcasters without a specialization. They exist in every race, though human mages are the rarest ones.

name: Archer
loreHtml: Archer is a name given to all users of ranged weaponry, regardless of whether they use a bow or not. They exist in every race and can use a wide variety of ranged weapons.
loreText: Archer is a name given to all users of ranged weaponry, regardless of whether they use a bow or not. They exist in every race and can use a wide variety of ranged weapons.

name: Armored Spider
loreHtml: A type of large spider that has evolved into having a thick armored carapace, giving it more bulk than other spider species.
loreText: A type of large spider that has evolved into having a thick armored carapace, giving it more bulk than other spider species.

name: Assassin
loreHtml: While the original assassins come from the desert city of Telsin, the term has evolved since then. It now refers to any sort of stealthy individual who seeks to eliminate priority targets quickly and efficiently. They exist in the employ of all major nations in the world, and people with a similar skill set are not hard to find in adventurer’s guilds, as well as other organizations.
loreText: While the original assassins come from the desert city of Telsin, the term has evolved since then. It now refers to any sort of stealthy individual who seeks to eliminate priority targets quickly and efficiently. They exist in the employ of all major nations in the world, and people with a similar skill set are not hard to find in adventurer’s guilds, as well as other organizations.

name: Astral Spider
loreHtml: A type of large spiders that has suffered from astral corruption, giving it teleportation abilities.
loreText: A type of large spiders that has suffered from astral corruption, giving it teleportation abilities.

name: Astral Tiger
loreHtml: The astral tiger is a tiger that has been corrupted by Astra. It phases in and out of reality at seeming random times, though the beast itself always seem perfectly aware of how it will move.
loreText: The astral tiger is a tiger that has been corrupted by Astra. It phases in and out of reality at seeming random times, though the beast itself always seem perfectly aware of how it will move.

loreHtml:
An astra corrupted magpie.

By Mega Mike 70

loreText: Angry furry cat

name: Bear
loreHtml: A common bear. Not a threat to adventurers, but still dangerous to the average person.
loreText: A common bear. Not a threat to adventurers, but still dangerous to the average person.

name: Black Knight
loreHtml: To do.
loreText: To do.

name: Boar
loreHtml: A common boar.
loreText: A common boar.

name: Broodmother
loreHtml: The broodmother is a giant spider that births other spiders.
loreText: The broodmother is a giant spider that births other spiders.

name: Brute
loreHtml: Brutes are combatants that specialize in melee combat. They exist in every race and civilization and can use a wide variety of weapons and armor.
loreText: Brutes are combatants that specialize in melee combat. They exist in every race and civilization and can use a wide variety of weapons and armor.

name: Burrowing Spider
loreHtml: A tiny spider that is like a parasite. Once it finds its way inside a host, it eats its way to the targets heart.
loreText: A tiny spider that is like a parasite. Once it finds its way inside a host, it eats its way to the targets heart.

name: Cheetah
loreHtml: A spotted big cat.
loreText: A spotted big cat.

name: Crystal Behemoth
loreHtml: A large fiend that feeds on the purple crystals that are embedded in its skin.
loreText: A large fiend that feeds on the purple crystals that are embedded in its skin.

name: Defender
loreHtml: Defenders are front liners who go in first and absorb the hits for their allies. Existing in every culture and of any race, they are usually heavily armored with shields.
loreText: Defenders are front liners who go in first and absorb the hits for their allies. Existing in every culture and of any race, they are usually heavily armored with shields.

loreHtml:
Summoning Cost: 1 AP, 1 Mana

10x10ft size

name: Drake
loreHtml: A distant relative of the dragons that have vanished. Though they spent most of their time sleeping in their caves, they are hostile to all living creatures and view them are little more than prey.
loreText: A distant relative of the dragons that have vanished. Though they spent most of their time sleeping in their caves, they are hostile to all living creatures and view them are little more than prey.

name: Drake Wyrmling (Fire)
loreHtml: A distant relative of the dragons that have vanished. The wyrmling is a young wyrm that has not yet matured. Despite their age, they are not any less hostile and vicious - attacking any unknown creature that approaches it.
loreText: A distant relative of the dragons that have vanished. The wyrmling is a young wyrm that has not yet matured. Despite their age, they are not any less hostile and vicious - attacking any unknown creature that approaches it.

name: Dreameater
loreHtml: A formless creature that only ever appears in someone's dreams. It can seemingly enter the dream of anyone, no matter how far away they are. Targets people that are alone and enjoys tormenting its prey until they eventually die to exhaustion. Once it has chosen its target, it will keep visiting it until either it or the victim dies.
loreText: A formless creature that only ever appears in someone's dreams. It can seemingly enter the dream of anyone, no matter how far away they are. Targets people that are alone and enjoys tormenting its prey until they eventually die to exhaustion. Once it has chosen its target, it will keep visiting it until either it or the victim dies.

name: Dredge Ooze
loreHtml: A common slime type creature corrupted by Astra. Now hostile to any living creature it sees.
loreText: A common slime type creature corrupted by Astra. Now hostile to any living creature it sees.

name: Earth Slime
loreHtml:
Just a slime.

By Nya.
loreText:
Just a slime.

By Nya.

name: Faewolf
loreHtml: Legends say these wolves were once normal forest predators who stumbled upon a fey nexus or were subject to an otherworldly curse. Over generations, they’ve adapted, developing unique teleportation powers fueled by a blend of spiritual mana and wild fae energy.
loreText: Legends say these wolves were once normal forest predators who stumbled upon a fey nexus or were subject to an otherworldly curse. Over generations, they’ve adapted, developing unique teleportation powers fueled by a blend of spiritual mana and wild fae energy.

name: Fire Slime
loreHtml:
Just a fire slime.

By Nya.
loreText:
Just a fire slime.

name: Fortuna
loreHtml: Summon cost: 4 AP, 4 Mana
loreText: Summon cost: 4 AP, 4 Mana

name: Frost Maiden
loreHtml: An ice elemental type creature that is inherently attracted to the warmth of other creatures. Said to be a manifestation of travelers that got lost in a blizzard and closely related to the yuki-onna youkai. Not a creature with malicious intent necessarily, but her way of thinking may be too alien to negotiate with.
loreText: An ice elemental type creature that is inherently attracted to the warmth of other creatures. Said to be a manifestation of travelers that got lost in a blizzard and closely related to the yuki-onna youkai. Not a creature with malicious intent necessarily, but her way of thinking may be too alien to negotiate with.

name: Gargoyle
loreHtml: Gargoyles are usually tied to an abandoned place made out of stone where they will lie dormant in their stone form until people approach. When living creatures get close enough, they will reveal themselves and attack them. The reason behind their hostility remains unclear, and most adventurers that don’t want to deal with them simply avoid their resting place.
loreText: Gargoyles are usually tied to an abandoned place made out of stone where they will lie dormant in their stone form until people approach. When living creatures get close enough, they will reveal themselves and attack them. The reason behind their hostility remains unclear, and most adventurers that don’t want to deal with them simply avoid their resting place.

name: Ghost
loreHtml: The ghost is an undead monster that spawned from a person that died while bearing a strong grudge. They are hostile to any living creature around them, mistaking them for the subject of their vengeance.
loreText: The ghost is an undead monster that spawned from a person that died while bearing a strong grudge. They are hostile to any living creature around them, mistaking them for the subject of their vengeance.

name: Ghoul
loreHtml: Ghouls are undead that are perpetually hungry. They feed on the corpses of dead creatures, preferably humanoids.
loreText: Ghouls are undead that are perpetually hungry. They feed on the corpses of dead creatures, preferably humanoids.

name: Giant Astra Crab
loreHtml:
The ultimate lifeform.

By Nya.
loreText:
The ultimate lifeform.

By Nya.

name: Giant Mantis
loreHtml: A mantis the size of a regular person. Nobody knows how they grew so big.
loreText: A mantis the size of a regular person. Nobody knows how they grew so big.

name: Giant Prismatic Slime
loreHtml: A fiend that appears like a giant slime. Seeks to devour the mana of other creatures.
loreText: A fiend that appears like a giant slime. Seeks to devour the mana of other creatures.

name: Giant Spider
loreHtml: A large spider that preys on regular people.
loreText: A large spider that preys on regular people.

name: Gravity Fiend
loreHtml: An Exousiai with gravity powers.
loreText: An Exousiai with gravity powers.

loreHtml:
An astra corrupted magpie

By Mega Mike 70
loreText:
An astra corrupted magpie

name: Greater Manticore
loreHtml: The greater manticore is a monstrous combination of three different types of animal originally fused together through magic. They possess little intelligence and do little more than feast on anyone unfortunate enough to run into one. Their second head is a mutation caused by astra corruption that only makes it more vicious.
loreText: The greater manticore is a monstrous combination of three different types of animal originally fused together through magic. They possess little intelligence and do little more than feast on anyone unfortunate enough to run into one. Their second head is a mutation caused by astra corruption that only makes it more vicious.

name: Gryphon
loreHtml: The gryphon despite its appearance is an animal that naturally appears in the wild. They are territorial, but not hostile to people that stay far enough away from them.
loreText: The gryphon despite its appearance is an animal that naturally appears in the wild. They are territorial, but not hostile to people that stay far enough away from them.

name: Heliamphora
loreHtml: The Heliamphora is a large pitcher plant, of which smaller versions are sometimes kept as house plants. It is effectively mindless, just luring in creatures with its pollen and attacking them to eat.
loreText: The Heliamphora is a large pitcher plant, of which smaller versions are sometimes kept as house plants. It is effectively mindless, just luring in creatures with its pollen and attacking them to eat.

name: Hobgoblin Boar Rider
loreHtml: Hobgoblins on a boar.
loreText: Hobgoblins on a boar.

loreHtml: Gobo
loreText: Gobo

name: Hobgoblin Tactician
loreHtml: A gobo tactician
loreText: A gobo tactician

name: Hydra
loreHtml: A weird animal that has three heads that each have their own thoughts. Each head itself is an intelligent creature (though they lack the ability to speak a common language), but the heads themselves are always in conflict. They struggle to make a decision on even the most basic things, sometimes resorting to infighting. Only when their existence is threatened by an outside source do the heads work together.

Each head itself is an intelligent creature (though they lack the ability to speak a common language), but the heads themselves are always in conflict. They struggle to make a decision on even the most basic things, sometimes resorting to infighting. Only when their existence is threatened by an outside source do the heads work together.

name: Ice Queen
loreHtml:
An ice elemental with high intelligence that commands other elementals and beasts in the area. She does this without directly communicating with them, merely her presence in the area is enough for ice creatures to submit.

She is domineering, but can be reasoned and negotiated with if shown the proper respect.

She is domineering, but can be reasoned and negotiated with if shown the proper respect.

loreHtml: A fiend found in storybook dungeons.

name: Landshark
loreHtml: The landshark is a small beast that travels below the ground and attacks travelers.
loreText: The landshark is a small beast that travels below the ground and attacks travelers.

name: Mage
loreHtml: Mages are spellcasters without a specialization. They are the most common type of mage, though most will soon specialize in an element or magic type. They exist in every race, though human mages are the rarest ones.
loreText: Mages are spellcasters without a specialization. They are the most common type of mage, though most will soon specialize in an element or magic type. They exist in every race, though human mages are the rarest ones.

name: Manticore
loreHtml: The manticore is a monstrous combination of three different types of animal originally fused together through magic. They possess little intelligence and do little more than feast on anyone unfortunate enough to run into one.
loreText: The manticore is a monstrous combination of three different types of animal originally fused together through magic. They possess little intelligence and do little more than feast on anyone unfortunate enough to run into one.

name: Minotaur
loreHtml: A creature often confused with the chimera of Northi. Despite a similar appearance, the original minotaur is a cursed creature once locked away in a labyrinth. Its offspring now roam the world, causing destruction wherever they go.
loreText: A creature often confused with the chimera of Northi. Despite a similar appearance, the original minotaur is a cursed creature once locked away in a labyrinth. Its offspring now roam the world, causing destruction wherever they go.

name: Ogre
loreHtml: A huge humanoid monster that possess some form of intelligence similar to that of a human child. They are often easily tricked by skilled manipulators who use them for their own goals.
loreText: A huge humanoid monster that possess some form of intelligence similar to that of a human child. They are often easily tricked by skilled manipulators who use them for their own goals.

loreHtml:
Summon cost: 4 AP, 4 Mana

10x10ft size

name: Priest
loreHtml: Priests are spellcasters that draw their power from the gods. Due to the popularity and strength of Kari, the human goddess, the vast majority of priests in the world are human. However, priests of other races do still exist. Some may follow Kari, while others may follow their own god or goddess.
loreText: Priests are spellcasters that draw their power from the gods. Due to the popularity and strength of Kari, the human goddess, the vast majority of priests in the world are human. However, priests of other races do still exist. Some may follow Kari, while others may follow their own god or goddess.

name: Raiju
loreHtml:
The raiju is often confused for an animal due to its appearance. In reality, its an elemental that serves as the hunting dog for a more powerful elemental creature. It will track and hound an enemy from afar, then move in for the kill once the weather changes.

Storms have an unnaturally high chance of appearing when this creature is around.
loreText:
The raiju is often confused for an animal due to its appearance. In reality, its an elemental that serves as the hunting dog for a more powerful elemental creature. It will track and hound an enemy from afar, then move in for the kill once the weather changes.

Storms have an unnaturally high chance of appearing when this creature is around.

name: Rhinoceros Beetle
loreHtml: Summon cost: 3 AP, 2 Mana.
loreText: Summon cost: 3 AP, 2 Mana.

name: Rime Vermin
loreHtml: An artificially made elemental creature that was created by a powerful Yuki Onna. Often is disguised as regular ice, but too slow to take advantage of any surprises.
loreText: An artificially made elemental creature that was created by a powerful Yuki Onna. Often is disguised as regular ice, but too slow to take advantage of any surprises.

name: Rogue
loreHtml: Rogues are shifty individuals that use trickery and dirty tactics to win battles. They exist in every race and society.
loreText: Rogues are shifty individuals that use trickery and dirty tactics to win battles. They exist in every race and society.

name: Skeletal Champion
loreHtml: A skeleton warrior summoned by necromancers.
loreText: A skeleton warrior summoned by necromancers.

name: Skeletal Monstrosity
loreHtml: These creatures are created by skilled necromancers and due to their regenerative abilities will often out live their masters. Though they are mindless, their former instructions still linger and they are likely to attack any creatures that approach it.
loreText: These creatures are created by skilled necromancers and due to their regenerative abilities will often out live their masters. Though they are mindless, their former instructions still linger and they are likely to attack any creatures that approach it.

name: Skeleton
loreHtml: Skeletons are the bones of people long dead that have been reanimated, usually through necromancy but rarely through astra corruption. They are mindless undead, swinging a weapon - often times a bone of themselves - at the closest living creature they see.
loreText: Skeletons are the bones of people long dead that have been reanimated, usually through necromancy but rarely through astra corruption. They are mindless undead, swinging a weapon - often times a bone of themselves - at the closest living creature they see.

name: Slime
loreHtml:
Just a slime.

By Nya.
loreText:
Just a slime.

By Nya.

name: Sniper
loreHtml: Sniper is a title given to all users of ranged weaponry that display some level of skill. They exist in every race and can use a wide variety of ranged weapons.
loreText: Sniper is a title given to all users of ranged weaponry that display some level of skill. They exist in every race and can use a wide variety of ranged weapons.

name: Tactician
loreHtml: Tacticians are found in virtually every society and can be of any race. Oftentimes, but not always, they are leaders such as a captain, general or something simpler like a bandit chief. They lead their troops to victory not always through charisma, but through tactics.
loreText: Tacticians are found in virtually every society and can be of any race. Oftentimes, but not always, they are leaders such as a captain, general or something simpler like a bandit chief. They lead their troops to victory not always through charisma, but through tactics.

name: Tank
loreHtml: Tanks are front liners who go in first and absorb the hits for their allies. Existing in every culture and of any race, they are usually heavily armored with shields.
loreText: Tanks are front liners who go in first and absorb the hits for their allies. Existing in every culture and of any race, they are usually heavily armored with shields.

name: Troll
loreHtml:
Trolls descend from what were once regular humans that mutated into these hideous creatures. 

In a way, they are similar to what hobgoblins are to normal goblins. Perhaps because of this, they are often found in the company of them.
loreText:
Trolls descend from what were once regular humans that mutated into these hideous creatures.

In a way, they are similar to what hobgoblins are to normal goblins. Perhaps because of this, they are often found in the company of them.

name: Unstable Efreet
loreHtml: Unstable Efreets are split off parts of a normal Efreet. Their very existence is a fleeting thing with them being able to exist for little more than day before their flames going out and them vanishing into nothingness.
loreText: Unstable Efreets are split off parts of a normal Efreet. Their very existence is a fleeting thing with them being able to exist for little more than day before their flames going out and them vanishing into nothingness.

name: Warrior
loreHtml: Warriors are combatants that specialize in melee combat. They exist in every race and civilization and can use a wide variety of weapons and armor.
loreText: Warriors are combatants that specialize in melee combat. They exist in every race and civilization and can use a wide variety of weapons and armor.

loreHtml:
Just a slime.

By Nya.

Just a slime.

name: Westrian Heavy Paladin
loreHtml: To do.
loreText: To do.

name: Wight
loreHtml: When a creature is slain by a Wraith, there's a high chance a Wight will be born from its corpse. Wights are automatically subservient to the Wraith that killed them and must stay within a mile radius of it or disappear entirely.
loreText: When a creature is slain by a Wraith, there's a high chance a Wight will be born from its corpse. Wights are automatically subservient to the Wraith that killed them and must stay within a mile radius of it or disappear entirely.

name: Wind Slime
loreHtml:
Just a slime.

By Nya.
loreText:
Just a slime.

By Nya.

name: Wolf
loreHtml: A normal wolf. Occasionally kept as pet.
loreText: A normal wolf. Occasionally kept as pet.

name: Wraith
loreHtml: A vengeful spirit that died in the darkness while it was still alive. Brought back to life through a necromancer or through astra corruption, they attack any living creature that they can see. They are weak to bright lights and will never willingly go into the sunlight.
loreText: A vengeful spirit that died in the darkness while it was still alive. Brought back to life through a necromancer or through astra corruption, they attack any living creature that they can see. They are weak to bright lights and will never willingly go into the sunlight.

name: Wyrm (Fire)
loreHtml: A distant relative of the dragons that have vanished. Though they spent most of their time sleeping in their caves, they are hostile to all living creatures and view them are little more than prey. Wyrms are older, more intelligent and more dangerous than their Drake and Wyrmling counterparts.

name: Zombies
loreHtml: Mindless corpses resurrected through necromancy or astra corruption.
